description_long: This stool features a square wooden seat with a natural grain finish, supported by a minimalist metal frame. The frame consists of four slender legs, each extending downward and connected by a semi-circular metal brace at the base, providing stability and a subtle design accent. The wood top appears smooth and polished, contrasting with the matte, industrial look of the metal legs. The stool lacks a backrest, emphasizing its simple, functional form. The semi-circular brace also serves as a footrest, enhancing comfort for users. Its compact and sturdy design makes it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, public plazas, or bus stops.
description: A square wooden stool with a smooth seat and minimalist metal legs, featuring a semi-circular footrest. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square wooden seat and the semi-circular metal footrest extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden seat and the profile of the metal footrest curving to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back legs and the full arc of the semi-circular footrest beneath the seat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the seat's edge and the footrest's curve from a different angle.
